data.title: Normalize generic generated queue strategy
data.description:
## Summary

Adopt `state/queue-generated.md` as the canonical generated queue for this workspace, align scripts/docs to the generic queue strategy, and explicitly retire or document legacy `queue-generated-dot.md` behavior.

## Context

The first autonomous run surfaced two generated queue files with only one of them actually referenced by current docs and scripts. We want future work to run through worktrees and PRs with one clear generated queue target.

## Acceptance Criteria

* `state/queue-generated.md` is the only canonical generated queue file for the generic strategy
* legacy `queue-generated-dot.md` handling is removed, documented, or intentionally kept with explicit rationale
* autonomous-run docs/prompts/scripts are internally consistent about queue fallback behavior
* local queue/task state no longer points at completed queue-maintenance work as if it were still active
* validation passes after the cleanup
